title: Ultimate Mob Rewards
description: UltimateMobRewards is a lightweight and customizable plugin that makes mob hunting more exciting by giving random item and money rewards when players kill hostile mobs. After reaching a set number of mob kills, players are rewarded with valuable loot.
body:
**Turn every hostile mob encounter into a chance for fortune with UltimateMobRewards!
This plugin tracks player kills on hostile mobs and grants random rewards — items and currency — once a configurable kill threshold is reached. Bosses like the Wither and Ender Dragon have their own powerful, fully customizable reward sets to make the fight even more worthwhile.**

**Whether you want to motivate players to explore dangerous areas, enhance server progression, or just add fun random rewards — this plugin delivers a balanced, easy-to-configure experience.**

## ⚙️ Key Features

**🎯 Kill Tracking: Set how many mob kills are required before rewards trigger (kills_required option).**

**💎 Random Rewards: Define multiple items for each mob type — the plugin picks one at random!**

**💰 Money Rewards: Optional economy integration with random payout ranges for each mob type.**

**🧱 Boss-Specific Rewards: Unique rewards, messages, and sounds for the Wither and Ender Dragon.**

**🔊 Custom Sounds & Messages: Fully configurable reward messages, action bars, and sound effects.**

**🌍 World Control: Enable or disable the plugin per world, perfect for multi-world servers.**

**🧩 Easy Configuration: Simple YAML setup**
